Scope of Work

Front Entry, Employee Entry, Reception and Waiting Area

• Entry door glass cleaned, inside, and out.

• Door handles wiped with disinfectant.

• Window ledges wiped.

• Removal of cobwebs in and around doorways.

• Tables and counters wiped with disinfectant.

• Carpeted flooring vacuumed (front door mats swept if saturated

with water).

• Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped, with special

attention to areas under furniture.

Offices, General Areas, Cubicles, Copy Areas, Bidding Room and Conference Rooms

• Desks and tables wiped with disinfectant were cleared. Note:

We will not disturb papers and personal items on these surfaces.

Surfaces prone to streaking will be cleaned with non-streak

cleaner.

• Cabinet tops, partition tops, windowsills, and tops of computers

dusted.

• Trash receptacles and recycle bins emptied and put in proper

receptacles.

• Carpeted flooring and rugs vacuumed.

• Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped.

• Window tracks in the five specified offices by customer inspected

and cleaned with each service.

Stairwell

• Hand railing wiped with disinfectant.

• Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped.

Kitchenette, Kitchen and Break Area

• Tables, countertops, and chairs wiped with disinfectant. Surfaces

prone to streaking will be cleaned with non-streak cleaner.

• Faces and tops of appliances, i.e., refrigerator, any water

stations, coffee machine wiped with disinfectant and top of

Refrigerator, dusted, if cleared.

• Microwaves wiped with disinfectant, inside and out.

• Stainless steel sinks scrubbed free of mineral deposits and wiped

with disinfectant. Handles and faucets wiped with disinfectant.

• Soap and paper towels refilled.

• Faces of cabinets spot checked for fingerprints and/or drips and

wiped with disinfectant, as needed.

• Trash receptacles and recycling receptacle emptied and put in

proper dumpsters.

• Carpeted flooring and rugs vacuumed.

• Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped.

Restrooms

• Door handles, knobs, and light switches disinfected.

• Porcelain sinks scrubbed free of mineral deposits and wiped with

disinfectant. Handles and faucets wiped with disinfectant

• Toilets and urinals scrubbed, inside and wiped outside with

disinfectant from plumbing to the base. Base of walls and floor

around toilets and urinals wiped with disinfectant.

• Backsplash, partitions, and partition doors wiped with

disinfectant, as needed.

• Soap, toilet paper and paper towels refilled. Dispensers wiped

down with disinfectant.

• Garbage receptacles are emptied and wiped with disinfectant.

• Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped.

• Stainless steel drinking fountains scrubbed free of mineral

deposits and wiped with disinfectant. Handles and faucets wiped

with disinfectant.

Glass

• Front entry glass is fully cleaned inside and out with each service.

• Windows on interior walls between offices conference rooms and

hallways inspected for handprints and/or smudges with each Sunday service. 

Sunday service.

1-Full Clean with Every Service.

Scope of Work
Front Entry, Employee Entry, Reception and Waiting Area
Entry door glass cleaned, inside, and out. 
Door handles wiped with disinfectant.
Window ledges wiped. 
Removal of cobwebs in and around doorways.
Tables and counters wiped with disinfectant, unless otherwise specified.
Carpeted flooring vacuumed (front door mats swept if saturated with water).
Hard-surfaced flooring dust mopped and mopped, with special attention to areas under furniture.
Offices
Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs.
Inspecting door glass if glass door. Sanitize door handles. Fingerprints cleaned, as needed. 
Wiping and/or dusting of window ledges free of bugs and debris. 
Remove cobwebs in and around doorways.
Full Restroom Cleaning
Sanitizing all fixtures, toilets, and urinals. 
Wiping backsplash, doors, and trash receptacles, as needed. 
Refilling soaps and paper products.
Sanitizing and polishing any drinking fountains.
Emptying of trash receptacles and put in proper dumpsters.
Washing base of walls near toilets and urinals, as needed. 
Sanitizing all door handles, knobs, fixtures & light switches. 
Sweeping and mopping of hard surfaced flooring.
Hallways and/or Walkways
Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs, including three rugs in the shop before entry into the office.
Wiping/dusting of handrails, window ledges and floor rail along stairwell landing and upstairs walkway. 
Emptying of trash receptacle outside of upstairs entry to shop.
Mopping of any hard surfaced flooring.
Wiping of stainless-steel foot door plates.
Full Kitchen and Breakroom Cleaning
Wiping faces and tops of appliances, i.e., refrigerators, water station, coffee machine and coffee urns.
Disinfecting and polishing the kitchen sink, if cleared of dishes.
Disinfecting of tables unless another cleaning agent is specified.
Checking faces of cabinets for fingerprints and/or drips.
Emptying of trash receptacles and put in proper dumpsters.
Sweeping and mopping of any hard surface flooring.
Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs.
Conference Room and Bidding Room
Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs.
Sanitizing of conference room tables, countertops, and other horizontal surfaces unless another cleaning agent is specified.
Emptying trash receptacles and putting them in the dumpster.
Specified Windows and Glass
Front entry door glass inspected and cleaned inside and out, as needed, with each service.
Foyer windows cleaned inside and out.
Glass doors to kitchen and conference room cleaned inside and out.
Glass chair mats cleaned.
This glass work will be performed on the 1st weekend cleaning of each month.

Alarms additional info: 
The 1st and 3rd floor doors by elevator to offices should be locked! Double check that you have turned the key to the lock position and check if doors are locked before arming. The supply closets are also locked doors opened by doors and the keys we have been provided.
There is a small key for the dumpster padlock, but we DO NOT lock it! We have the key in case someone else has locked it. You rock!!To disarm the alarm press the CMD key.
Look at the display.
Press the button directly under DISARM.
The display will say "Enter Code".
Enter code 2665
The red light should go off! To arm press CMD.
Press the button directly under ARM.
Enter code 2665.
The red light should illuminate.
If the word FAULT appears, there is an open door or motion.

Offices & Cubicles

• Sanitize door handles. Fingerprints cleaned, as needed.  • Tables and counters wiped with disinfectant, unless otherwise  specified. 
• Desks and tables wiped with disinfectant, where cleared. Note:  We will not disturb papers and personal items on these  surfaces. 
• Wiping and/or dusting of window ledges free of bugs and  debris.  
• Remove cobwebs in and around doorways. 

Full Restroom Cleaning 

• Sanitizing all fixtures, toilets, and urinals.  Make sure no mineral buildup or rust residue is left in toilets. Use “The Works” cleaner only in toilets or urinals. Be careful not to splash “The Works” cleaner on any surface except porcelain.
• Wiping backsplash, doors, and trash receptacles, as needed. 
 • Refilling soaps and paper products. 
• Sanitizing and polishing any drinking fountains.

Hallways & Walkways

• Wiping/dusting of handrails, window ledges and floor rail  along stairwell landing and upstairs walkway.  
• Mopping of any hard surfaced flooring. 

Full Kitchen and Breakroom Cleaning 

• Wiping faces and tops of appliances, i.e., refrigerators, water  station, coffee machine and coffee urns. 
• Disinfecting and polishing of kitchen sink, if cleared of dishes. 
• Disinfecting of tables unless another cleaning agent is specified. 
• Checking faces of cabinets for fingerprints and/or drips. 
• Emptying of trash receptacles and put in proper dumpsters. 
• Sweeping and mopping of any hard surface flooring.
 • Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs. 

Conference Room 

• Vacuuming of any carpeted flooring and rugs. 
• Sanitizing of conference room table, countertops, and other  horizontal surfaces unless another cleaning agent is specified. 
• Emptying of trash receptacles and put in dumpster.

SPECIAL CLEANING INSTRUCTIONS:
Dusting and disinfectant wiping of surfaces and behind desks is extremely important to customer!  
-We will move small mobile items like staplers, hole punches, keyboards, computer mouse, and pens.  
-We will use ostreich feather duster on faces and backs of monitors, behind monitors and around cords when the computer stands are lifted, telephones, around plants, on ledges that are too small to wipe, bases of chairs and any other conspicuous areas that are dusty and reachable by feather duster.
-We will not disturb papers, sticky notes, personal items that could break, baskets of papers, file folders, books, phones, printers, plants etc. 
Your satisfaction is our top priority. We take pride in maintaining a professional, hygienic, and welcoming workplace for your team, ensuring a seamless and worry-free cleaning experience.
